a.xlink:title: Synchronizes the grid state and manages side effects based on the current application mode.
Synchronizes the grid state during manual solving.
Handles grid persistence and completion verification during regular gameplay.
Checks if the current UI context is set to the Solve menu.
Utility method to reset a cell to its initial editable state.
Calculates the solution based on anchored cells and updates editable cells.
Returns whether the current game has a non-empty default grid.
Checks if all 81 cells contain valid single-digit values (1-9).
Persists the current grid state for the active player’s selected game.
Validates the grid by attempting to solve it.
Gets a list of all cell text values in row-major order.
Checks whether the GridViewModel has been initialized via init().
Handles all actions when a grid is successfully completed.
